_comment: Style pack contract — the engine reads ONLY this + bg.png. A user's brand never touches the engine code. Generate a fresh one per user with /huashu-design (or hand-edit). Colours: hex for HTML (gen_title/bg), ASS &HAABBGGRR for burned subtitles.
name: neutral-default

card.comment: where the slide/clip is composited (must match the white card drawn in bg.png)

title.font: "Songti TC","Noto Serif TC","Source Han Serif TC",serif

cta.line2: 留言 ==關鍵字== 我私訊你
